verdict: Labels are reasonably consistent (self-MAE 0.38 WA, 3% surfacing flips). Under-fit articles re-label STABLE-HIGH -> student genuinely fails them, not label noise. Student is below the label floor on every dim (~0.1-0.15/dim headroom) so student CAN improve, but human_agency (0.55) + measurable_outcomes (0.50) are the noisy dims capping both.
conclusion: Gemini 2.2x more self-consistent (0.173 vs 0.380) -> lower student MAE floor. DeepSeek is the wrong oracle for nature_recovery (inherited from cd v5 cost decision, skipped per-filter bake-off). Recommend re-label with Gemini + v4 prompt (keeps #70), retrain, re-gate. Matches v2's proven Gemini->83% recall.
